name: Stack-a-Dinner
recipeIngredient: 1 pound ground chicken breast, skinless, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add chicken, onions, and bell peppers to the skillet.
3. Cook until the chicken is no longer tender and vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in tomato sauce, catsup, oregano, hot sauce, water, salt, and black pepper.
5. Bring mixture to a boil and stir often.
